name: Pool Service
title: AI Tools for Pool Service Companies | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for pool service — keep recurring routes on schedule, book new accounts, and chase renewals. Unlimited AI agents for one flat $3,500/month.
hero_lede: Recurring routes are the backbone of pool service, and they need steady contact. We build the tools that keep every account on schedule and the season's new customers coming in.
drains: New-account inquiries spiking every spring and summer
Recurring service accounts needing reliable, steady contact
Renewals and seasonal openings/closings slipping off schedule
Repair quotes that go quiet with no follow-up

tools.title: New-account assistant
tools.body: Every inquiry gets an instant reply with your pricing, a service plan recommended, and the first visit booked — turning the spring rush into signed weekly accounts.

tools.title: Route & renewal manager
tools.body: It keeps recurring service accounts on schedule, sends seasonal opening and closing reminders, and nudges renewals before they lapse.

tools.title: Repair-quote follow-up
tools.body: Equipment repair and upgrade quotes get tracked and followed up, so pump and heater jobs don't slip away after the first conversation.

tools.title: Morning route brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's stops in route order, tech assignments, repairs scheduled, and yesterday's numbers.

cases.context: A pool service company built on weekly maintenance routes.
cases.before: Seasonal openings and renewals slipped because no one tracked the dates closely.
cases.after: Every account's schedule and renewal tracked and nudged automatically.
cases.impact: Representative result: fewer lapsed accounts and a steadier recurring base.

cases.context: A company overwhelmed by spring new-account inquiries.
cases.before: The spring rush outpaced the office; many inquiries went cold.
cases.after: Every inquiry answered instantly with pricing and a booked first visit.
cases.impact: Representative result: more spring inquiries converted into year-round accounts.

faq.q: Can it handle seasonal openings and closings?
faq.a: Yes. It tracks each account and sends opening and closing reminders on schedule, so seasonal service work gets booked instead of forgotten.

faq.q: Does it help with equipment-repair sales?
faq.a: Yes. Repair and upgrade quotes — pumps, heaters, filters — get tracked and followed up so they don't go quiet after the first chat.

faq.q: Will it work with my routing software?
faq.a: Yes. We build on top of Skimmer, Pool Office Manager, or whatever you use to manage routes.
